name: usage-trace
description: Trace Java field usage, call chains, and database tables with an offline HTML report.

interface.shortDescription: Trace Java field usage, call chains, and database tables.
interface.longDescription: Analyze a Java/Spring or plain Java project for a keyword such as orderId, then generate a single offline HTML report with usage sites, call chain, and database table access.
defaultPrompt: Analyze storeNo usage in the current Java project.
Trace a Java field and summarize touched database tables.
